# Specification Sections

## 📄️Flag Evaluation API

The specification that defines the developer facing feature flag evaluation API.

## 📄️Provider

The specification that defines the interfaces, behaviors and responsibilities of providers.

## 📄️Evaluation Context

The specification that defines the structure and expectations of evaluation context.

## 📄️Hooks

The specification that defines the expectations and life cycle of hooks.

## 📄️Events

Specification defining event semantics

## 📄️Tracking

Specification defining tracking API
